name: Port of Shanghai
notes: World's largest container port by volume. China's primary export gateway; disruption would affect global electronics and manufacturing supply chains.

name: Port of Singapore
notes: World's second busiest port. Sits at the Malacca Strait chokepoint; controls Southeast Asian trade flows.

name: Port of Rotterdam
notes: Europe's largest port. Gateway for European energy imports and manufacturing inputs.

name: Jebel Ali Port
notes: Middle East's largest port. Critical Gulf logistics hub; US Navy's largest foreign port call location.

name: Port of Busan
notes: Northeast Asia's logistics hub. Critical for Korean electronics and automotive exports; US military supply chain.

name: Port of Karachi
notes: Pakistan's primary port. CPEC terminus; strategically significant for China's Arabian Sea access.
